title: • Two-Class Buffs: Last for the next two full class sessions.
content:
• Two-Class Buffs: Last for the next two full class sessions.
• Three-Class Debuffs: Last for three full class sessions unless countered.

✔ New Rule: No Passive Buffs Beyond Their Duration
• Buffs must be activated within their time frame or they expire.
• Cannot be stored indefinitely.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Keeps players engaged without overpowered stacking.
✔ Introduces strategy in when buffs are used.
✔ Encourages faster decision-making.

📜 2. Archetype-Based Item Restrictions

📜 Certain items are now locked to specific archetypes.

✔ Item Categories & Restrictions:
• Weapons & Armor: Only usable by combat-aligned archetypes (e.g., The Warrior).
• Literary Relics: Only usable by knowledge-based archetypes (e.g., The Archivist).
• Dark Artifacts & Cursed Objects: Only usable by morally ambiguous archetypes (e.g., The Fallen Angel).
• Healer & Support Items: Only usable by support-based archetypes (e.g., The Oracle).
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 445 (chunk 445/555)
